textByHashes.2f10fc22c121e4a5cb1bb92741e094d22d401297: Are you interested in buying or selling spice?
textByHashes.a49fae88f6032d99e14e7aed8fce57df3f178e21: A new market could put me out of business! Why should I help fund it?
textByHashes.b3c88b60c803a42613897f101421c9dc92c8425f: I will make sure the people hear about this!
textByHashes.6448b20542782e3d7ed8b9c6346cc579f93f0628: A mourner wouldn't be sent to tell me this. Go away!
textByHashes.5055139713d08a7717307f075261609950b5645b: A citizen wouldn't be sent to tell me this. Go away!
textByHashes.191312e2125c128c3bc1e74c493c8a50be0bb494: Hey! Get your hands off there!
textByHashes.bb8a164a3321aa6f8a12fe948ec2e940b594a61a: You're the one who stole something from me!
